parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4.1', input: $('Prepare Competition Prompts').all().find(i => i.json.model_name === 'GPT-4.1').json.systemPrompt + '\n\n' + $('Prepare Competition Prompts').all().find(i => i.json.model_name === 'GPT-4.1').json.userPrompt }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'deepseek-chat', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: $('Prepare Competition Prompts').all().find(i => i.json.model_name === 'DeepSeek').json.systemPrompt }, { role: 'user', content: $('Prepare Competition Prompts').all().find(i => i.json.model_name === 'DeepSeek').json.userPrompt }], max_tokens: 2000, temperature: 0.7 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'sonar-pro', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: $('Prepare Competition Prompts').all().find(i => i.json.model_name === 'Sonar')?.json.systemPrompt || '' }, { role: 'user', content: $('Prepare Competition Prompts').all().find(i => i.json.model_name === 'Sonar')?.json.userPrompt || '' }], max_tokens: 500, temperature: 0.7 }) }}

={{ (() => { const decisions = $('Merge All Decisions').all().map(i => i.json); const prompts = $('Prepare Competition Prompts').all().map(i => i.json); const market = $('Get Market Data').first().json; const portfolios = $('Get All Portfolios').all().map(i => i.json); const price = parseFloat(market.close_price || 0).toLocaleString(); const rsi = parseFloat(market.rsi || 0).toFixed(1); const change24h = parseFloat(market.price_change_24h || 0).toFixed(2); const trend15m = market.trend_15m || 'N/A'; const trend1h = market.trend_1h || 'N/A'; const score15m = market.trend_score_15m || 0; const score1h = market.trend_score_1h || 0; const adx15m = parseFloat(market.adx_15m || 0).toFixed(1); const squeezePct = parseFloat(market.squeeze_pct_15m || 0).toFixed(1); const volSent = parseFloat(market.volume_sentiment_15m || 0).toFixed(1); const marketState = market.market_state || 'UNKNOWN'; const confidence = market.trend_confidence || 'LOW'; const getScoreEmoji = (s) => s >= 40 ? '🟢' : s >= 20 ? '🟡' : s <= -40 ? '🔴' : s <= -20 ? '🟠' : '⚪'; const getStateEmoji = (st) => st === 'TRENDING_UP' ? '📈' : st === 'TRENDING_DOWN' ? '📉' : st === 'SQUEEZE' ? '🔄' : st === 'RANGING' ? '↔️' : '📊'; const getConfEmoji = (c) => c === 'HIGH' ? '🔥' : c === 'MEDIUM' ? '👍' : '⚠️'; const getVolEmoji = (v) => v > 30 ? '🟢매수' : v > 15 ? '🟡약매수' : v < -30 ? '🔴매도' : v < -15 ? '🟠약매도' : '⚪중립'; const getSqzStatus = (p) => p > 20 ? '🔴' + p + '%' : p > 10 ? '🟠' + p + '%' : p > 0 ? '🟡' + p + '%' : '⚪없음'; const sorted = [...portfolios].sort((a,b) => parseFloat(b.current_balance) - parseFloat(a.current_balance)); const leaderboard = sorted.slice(0,3).map((p,i) => { const m = prompts.find(x => x.model_id === p.model_id); const name = m ? m.model_name : '?'; const bal = parseFloat(p.current_balance).toFixed(0); const medal = i===0 ? '🥇' : i===1 ? '🥈' : '🥉'; return medal + ' ' + name + ': $' + bal; }).join(' '); const aiStatus = decisions.map(d => { const m = prompts.find(p => p.model_id === d.model_id); const name = m ? m.model_name : '?'; const act = d.original_action || d.action; const icon = (act === 'OPEN_LONG' || d.action === 'LONG') ? '🟢' : (act === 'OPEN_SHORT' || d.action === 'SHORT') ? '🔴' : (act.includes('CLOSE') || d.action.includes('CLOSE')) ? '🟡' : '⚪'; const status = d.confidence > 0 ? icon + ' ' + d.action.replace('OPEN_','').replace('_',' ') + ' ' + d.confidence + '%' : '❌ ERROR'; return name + ': ' + status; }).join(' '); const working = decisions.filter(d => d.confidence > 0).length; const msg = '🏟️ AI Trading Arena v5.1 💹 BTCUSD: $' + price + ' 📊 RSI: ' + rsi + ' | ' + change24h + '% ━━━ 📈 트렌드 분석 ━━━ ' + getStateEmoji(marketState) + ' State: ' + marketState + ' ' + getScoreEmoji(score15m) + ' 15M: ' + score15m + ' (' + trend15m + ') ' + getScoreEmoji(score1h) + ' 1H: ' + score1h + ' (' + trend1h + ') 📏 ADX: ' + adx15m + ' ' + getConfEmoji(confidence) + ' ' + confidence + ' 🔄 Squeeze: ' + getSqzStatus(squeezePct) + ' 💰 Vol: ' + getVolEmoji(volSent) + ' (' + volSent + '%) 🏆 Top 3: ' + leaderboard + ' 🤖 AI Decisions (' + working + '/8): ' + aiStatus + ' ⏰ ' + new Date().toISOString().slice(11,19) + ' UTC'; return JSON.stringify({chat_id:'-1003644771027',parse_mode:'HTML',text:msg}); })() }}

={{ (() => { const d = $json; const errors = d.errors || []; const creditErrors = d.creditErrors || []; let severityIcon = '⚠️'; let severityText = 'Warning'; if (d.isCriticalFailure) { severityIcon = '🔴🔴🔴'; severityText = 'CRITICAL'; } else if (d.hasCreditIssue) { severityIcon = '💳🔴'; severityText = 'Credit Issue'; } const errorList = errors.map(function(e) { const typeIcon = e.isCreditError ? '💳' : e.errorType === 'TIMEOUT' ? '⏱️' : '❌'; return typeIcon + ' ' + e.modelName + ': ' + (e.reason || '').substring(0, 80); }).join(' '); const workingList = (d.workingModels || []).map(function(m) { return '✅ ' + m.modelName; }).join(', '); const pauseWarning = d.shouldPauseTrading ? ' ⚠️ Trading pause recommended!' : ''; let creditDetail = ''; if (creditErrors.length > 0) { creditDetail = ' 💳 Credit Issues: '; creditDetail += creditErrors.map(function(e) { return '- ' + e.modelName + ' (' + e.provider + ')'; }).join(' '); } const msg = severityIcon + ' AI API Error ' + '📊 ' + severityText + ' ' + 'Failed: ' + d.errorCount + '/5 ' + 'Working: ' + d.workingCount + '/5 ' + 'Errors: ' + errorList + creditDetail + pauseWarning + ' ✅ Working: ' + (workingList || 'None') + ' ⏰ ' + new Date().toISOString().substring(11,19) + ' UTC'; return JSON.stringify({chat_id: '-1003644771027', parse_mode: 'HTML', text: msg}); })() }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'moonshotai/kimi-k2-instruct-0905', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: $json.systemPrompt + ' IMPORTANT: Your reasoning field MUST be detailed and comprehensive, at least 200 characters. Explain your analysis of RSI, MACD, market regime, risk factors, and why you chose this specific action. Do NOT give brief or terse reasoning.' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.userPrompt }], temperature: 0.7, max_tokens: 1000 }) }}
